title: clusia steyermarkii
intro: Clusia steyermarkii is a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae, commonly known as the "golden clusia" due to its yellow or golden flowers. The plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, which are attributed to the presence of bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Clusia steyermarkii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antiviral and antifungal activities. Herbal preparations of Clusia steyermarkii can be made by infusing the leaves or flowers in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's extracts in topical applications to promote skin health and wound healing.
